name: garyhtou
description: Gary Tou's personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins. Add it once, then install any plugin from it.

plugins.name: high-fidelity-web
plugins.description: Design-engineering skills for awwwards-grade interactive, animated marketing and landing sites: a full-lifecycle build skill, a standalone quality-audit skill, and a skill for building 3D models for the web (procedural Blender to glTF to Three.js/R3F).

plugins.name: rails-testing
plugins.description: Senior Rails test engineering for both RSpec and Minitest. Auto-detects the framework, then writes behavior-first tests that don't go flaky or silently slow: Sandi Metz's mocking policy, a classicist default, request-specs-over-controller-specs, first-class Minitest + fixtures, factory_bot discipline, a flaky-test playbook, and N+1 / query-count performance tests. Composes with test-driven-development.

plugins.name: multi-lens-research
plugins.description: Rigorous multi-lens research: instead of repeating one search, it researches from distinct lenses (academic, technical, applied, news, and a dedicated contrarian lens), adversarially verifies load-bearing claims, runs anti-confirmation-bias rounds, and reports what is verified, contested, and unknown, with citations. Parallel subagent fan-out or single-agent fallback.
